super_admin.label: Platform Admin
super_admin.description: Manages the full Sentinel platform across organizations.

org_admin.label: Org Admin
org_admin.description: Full administrative control within one organization.

compliance_admin.label: Compliance Admin
compliance_admin.description: Manages governance rules, alerts, and oversight settings.

operator.label: Operator
operator.description: Manages integrations, API keys, and operational testing.

reviewer.label: Reviewer
reviewer.description: Views dashboards and activity relevant to daily oversight.

auditor.label: Auditor
auditor.description: Reviews logs, reports, and audit evidence.
